basic_details.job_title: EPI Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) – Walk in for Assistant Manager / Manager / Senior Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Manager / Manager Gr.II / Senior Manager
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects (India) Limited (EPI), a Mini Ratna Central Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Heavy Industries, Government of India, has released a Walk-in Interview notification for 2026. The organization is engaged in executing a wide range of multi-faceted turnkey projects in Power, Steel, Industrial, Civil, and Infrastructure sectors. Eligible candidates are invited for Walk-in-Interview for various managerial posts on a fixed-term basis.

vacancy_details.details: Assistant Manager (Civil) – E-1 Level Manager Gr.II (Electrical) – E-2 Level Senior Manager (Civil) – E-4 Level Fixed Term Basis Appointment

how_to_apply: Candidates must attend Walk-in Interview directly
Carry all original documents and photocopies
Visit official EPI website for details before attending
Report at the venue on scheduled date

rows.engineering_projects_india_limited_epi: Assistant Manager / Manager Gr.II / Senior Manager

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Assistant Manager (Civil) – E-1 Level Manager Gr.II (Electrical) – E-2 Level Senior Manager (Civil) – E-4 Level Fixed Term Basis Appointment

content_sections.heading: Walk-in Interview Details
content_sections.text: Venue: Engineering Projects (India) Limited, Flat No. 201, Plot No. 109, Unit-07, Surya Nagar, Bamara Manor, Bhubaneswar, Odisha - 751003

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates must attend Walk-in Interview directly Carry all original documents and photocopies Visit official EPI website for details before attending Report at the venue on scheduled date

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Website: Click Here Employment News Official Notification: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the recruitment mode for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection will be done through Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Engineering Projects (India) Limited (EPI), a Mini Ratna PSU under the Government of India.

faq.question: Q4. What are the available posts in EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Assistant Manager (Civil), Manager Gr.II (Electrical), and Senior Manager (Civil).

faq.question: Q5. What is the job location for selected candidates?
faq.answer: The job location is Bhubaneswar, Odisha.
